'''Sla Tsun''' was a member of [[Domain Tsun]] and one of six [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commanders]] that commanded the flotilla sent to attack [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] during the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|Battle]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]]. [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] ordered him and Supreme Commander [[Tivvik]] to drive their [[matalok]]s into Zonama Sekot. Whether Sla Tsun survived the battle was unknown.
